name: bank-of-z
notes: IBM banking sample carrying the CBSA program set (src/base/cics/cobol) plus IMS programs (CALL 'CBLTDLI') and batch (BANKDATA). Exercises DB2 tables (ACCOUNT, CUSTOMER, CONTROL, PROCTRAN) and cross-subsystem structure. CBLTDLI/CEE* are platform APIs (external).

queries.q: which programs write the PROCTRAN table
queries.evidence: mined data_access: CREACC writes PROCTRAN (among others — loose match accepted)

queries.q: batch program that loads bank data

completeness.why: data-load program (src/base/cics/cobol/BANKDATA.cbl); only literal CALL 'CEEGMT'/'CEEDATM' (external LE APIs), no dynamic dispatch

gaps.evidence: CBLTDLI is the IMS DL/I language interface (20 call sites); CEE* are LE callable services; DFH*/SQLCA are CICS/DB2-provided
